features.description: Research and add real source URLs for all 'Inspired by' links. There are 18 sources across 10 tracks in lib/albums.ts, all with url: ''. For EACH source: (1) call mcp__lennysdata__search_content with the guest name, (2) find the matching Lenny Substack article (lennysnewsletter.com or lennyrachitsky.com), (3) call mcp__lennysdata__read_content to confirm and get URL, (4) update the url field in lib/albums.ts. If no Lenny article exists for a source, link to the original source but update the title to indicate it (e.g. 'Do Things That Don't Scale (paulgraham.com)'). DO NOT invent URLs. If unfindable, leave url as ''. Also fix TrackPageClient.tsx display: when url is non-empty, wrap in <a> tag (target='_blank', rel='noopener noreferrer') with ExternalLink icon. Show source title as link text, NOT 'Based on Lenny's episode with {guest}'. When url is empty, show as plain text using title. DONE: every source has a real URL or is confirmed unfindable, TrackPageClient.tsx renders clickable links. DO NOT TOUCH: audio files, lyrics, album structure. VERIFY: pnpm build passes, open any track page and confirm source links are clickable and go to real pages.
steps: Read all sources from lib/albums.ts
For each source, search Lenny MCP with guest name using mcp__lennysdata__search_content
Confirm match and get URL via mcp__lennysdata__read_content
Update url field in lib/albums.ts for each source
Fix source display in TrackPageClient.tsx to show title as link text with ExternalLink icon
pnpm build passes

features.description: Add coverImage field to the data layer. Add coverImage: string to the Track type in lib/types.ts. For each track in lib/albums.ts, add coverImage: '/covers/{slug}.jpg' (e.g. coverImage: '/covers/ship-it.jpg'). Cover image files already exist in public/covers/. DONE: every track has a coverImage field, TypeScript compiles. DO NOT TOUCH: any components, audio files, or lyrics. VERIFY: pnpm build passes, no TypeScript errors.
steps: Add coverImage: string to Track type in lib/types.ts
Add coverImage field to every track in lib/albums.ts
pnpm build passes

features.description: Replace album cards on home page with a cover art grid. Keep the existing warm Lenny light theme (cream/white backgrounds, warm orange accents). DO NOT switch to dark theme. Replace the current 2-column card grid in app/page.tsx with a responsive album cover art grid. Each card: square cover image on top (~160-180px, rounded-lg) using album.coverImage, album title below in bold, track count + subtitle in muted text. Responsive: 2 cols mobile, 3-4 cols tablet, 4-6 cols desktop (must scale to many albums). Use Next.js Image component with width/height/alt. DONE: home page shows album cover art images in a responsive grid. DO NOT TOUCH: audio files, lyrics, other pages, color theme. VERIFY: pnpm build passes, open home page and see album cover images.
steps: Import Image from next/image in app/page.tsx
Replace card grid with cover art grid layout
Add responsive columns
pnpm build passes

In each track row: add a small cover art thumbnail (~40x40, rounded) between the track number and the track title, using the track's coverImage field. Use Next.js Image component. VERIFY: pnpm build passes, open any album page and see cover art in header and thumbnails in rows.

Add album cover image to header layout (horizontal with title)

features.description: Remove all em dashes from user-facing non-lyric text. Replace ALL em dashes (the long dash character) with regular dashes, commas, periods, or natural rewrites. Files to check: lib/albums.ts (moods, descriptions, concepts, keyInsights, storyBehind, keyQuotes), app/page.tsx, app/layout.tsx, app/album/[slug]/page.tsx, app/track/[slug]/page.tsx, TrackPageClient.tsx, NowPlayingBar.tsx, ShareLyricModal.tsx. For page titles and share text use ' | ' or ' - '. For moods and descriptions rewrite naturally. DONE: zero em dashes in user-facing non-lyric text. DO NOT TOUCH: em dashes inside song lyrics (artistic choice), code comments, the regex in SyncedLyrics.tsx, audio files. VERIFY: pnpm build passes, grep for em dashes confirms none remain outside lyrics and comments.
steps: Find all em dashes in target files
Replace each with natural alternative
Confirm none remain outside lyrics/comments
pnpm build passes
